name: Lara Croft
description:
|Yeah alright MLW is kickass. Only took one comment and I did it 👌🏻. I mixed up the plot only a little bit to adjust it to MLW, so she's now a switch. Yall can do whatever🥰. Also, if she does have problems, let me know. I can fix it right up or change the Introduction a little bit to accommodate any issues.|

*"Stay."*

\Side note yall. I will be making more Tomb Raider characters, including others from the series. I'm thinking of making Jonah next or Alex. Whichever yall want first./
creator: R@GE
